tweets.text:
EIA reported -1.7 million bbls for crude, -3 million bbls for SPR. -4.7 million bbls total. 

Total liquids saw a build of 10.3 million bbls as product exports fell by 1.785 million bbls week over week. 

Implied demand for distillate dropped by 25%, which is likely a timing issue. Distillate inventory saw a build of 4.6 million bbls.

thread_tweets.text:
EIA reported -1.7 million bbls for crude, -3 million bbls for SPR. -4.7 million bbls total. 

Total liquids saw a build of 10.3 million bbls as product exports fell by 1.785 million bbls week over week. 

Implied demand for distillate dropped by 25%, which is likely a timing issue. Distillate inventory saw a build of 4.6 million bbls.
thread_tweets.full_text:
EIA reported -1.7 million bbls for crude, -3 million bbls for SPR. -4.7 million bbls total. 

Total liquids saw a build of 10.3 million bbls as product exports fell by 1.785 million bbls week over week. 

Implied demand for distillate dropped by 25%, which is likely a timing issue. Distillate inventory saw a build of 4.6 million bbls.

thread_tweets.text:
EIA has reported draws below our estimate. Partially attributed to higher than expected US crude oil production, but also related to when those barrels return (storage difference). 

The lag can last 2-4 weeks.
thread_tweets.full_text:
EIA has reported draws below our estimate. Partially attributed to higher than expected US crude oil production, but also related to when those barrels return (storage difference). 

The lag can last 2-4 weeks.

tweets.full_text:
EIA reported -1.7 million bbls for crude, -3 million bbls for SPR. -4.7 million bbls total. 

Total liquids saw a build of 10.3 million bbls as product exports fell by 1.785 million bbls week over week. 

Implied demand for distillate dropped by 25%, which is likely a timing issue. Distillate inventory saw a build of 4.6 million bbls.

EIA has reported draws below our estimate. Partially attributed to higher than expected US crude oil production, but also related to when those barrels return (storage difference). 

The lag can last 2-4 weeks.

tweets.text:
I honestly don’t think there is a bigger scam than trading card hobby boxes.  The RTP is literally 1%, meaning 99% loss is the most common outcome.

Complete joke of an industry.  $500-1k boxes that yield all trash.  

I say this every time I rip them, but this time I’m serious - never again.
tweets.full_text:
I honestly don’t think there is a bigger scam than trading card hobby boxes.  The RTP is literally 1%, meaning 99% loss is the most common outcome.

Complete joke of an industry.  $500-1k boxes that yield all trash.  

I say this every time I rip them, but this time I’m serious - never again.
